entities.description: teenage boy, slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark pants, wet sneakers, worried eyes visible under hood
small gray cat with sleek fur, bright eyes, pointed ears, long tail, expressive face
rainy city street at night, wet pavement, puddles, dim streetlights, narrow alley edges

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of the rainy city street at night; the boy in a hooded raincoat walks alone through heavy rain, reflected in puddles under a dim streetlight.
Low-angle view near a puddle as the gray cat appears on a wet curb, staring directly at the boy; the boy stops in surprise, rain streaking between them.

Closer dramatic composition: the cat sits upright with an open mouth and confident expression as if speaking, with a small unreadable speech bubble; the boy leans back, startled, eyes wide under his hood.
The boy crouches and offers his hand toward the gray cat; the cat calmly steps closer, rain softening around them, creating a mysterious but gentle mood on the empty night street.
